title: enteropogon chlorideus
intro: Enteropogon chlorideus, also known as Blue Grass or Blue Cangkring, is a type of tropical grass native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Enteropogon chlorideus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from muscle and joint pain. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
